prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东北大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7475名→7567名→8860名→8842名→8325名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年有所回升（前移约51 7名），近5年位次中枢约在8200–8900名区间，2025年基准位次约8325名；东北大学在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年30人、2022年30人、2023年30人、2024年3 0人、2025年31人、2026年32人。2026年较2025年增加1人，小幅扩招约3.2%，扩招对竞争压力有轻微加剧作用，位次数字预计有所增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学是 教育部直属的985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第38名（2025年第37名、2024年第39名），近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，属于中上游985高校，办学 层次稳固，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年学校声誉评价为中性/混合（主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议），2025年声誉偏负面（实习安全事故），抖音综合热度排 名第82位（评价为一般），整体曝光度不高；2026年声誉信号中无重大负面舆情，对报考心理影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖 ），计算机科学与技术获评A，软件工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程获评A-，冶金工程获评A，共6个A-及以上学科。自动化类、计算机类、机器人工程等招生专业与优势学科高 度匹配，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2026年专业热度分析中均被评为高热推荐或推荐，与东北大学自动化类、 计算机类等招生专业方向高度契合，相关专业热度持续走高。北京市2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年（65434人）大幅增加约29.7%，竞争环境显著加剧，对位次有 推高作用。；东北大学校本部位于辽宁省沈阳市，属于东北地区。北京考生对东北地区高校存在一定地域偏好差异，但东北 大学作为985高校品牌效应较强，且在北京招生计划稳定在30人左右，2026年扩至32人，招生规模相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8325名、2026年小幅扩招（31→ 32人，推高位次约161名）、北京市考生总数大幅增加约29.7%（竞争加剧推高位次）、优势学科与热门专业高度契合（部分吸引考生）、学校层次稳固等因素。预测2026年最低录取位次约8536名，波动区间8036–9036名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8036–9036名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次在区间下限（8036名）附近可重点冲刺自动化类、计算机类等一档王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约8500名）以二档的机械类、经济管理试验班为主；位次在区间上限（9036名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对友好的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northeastern University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 7475 → 7567 → 8860 → 8842 → 8325, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it rebounded compared to 2024 (moving forward by about 517 places). The median ranking over the past 5 years is around 8200–8900, with a baseline ranking of about 8325 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Northeastern University in Beijing's comprehensive category: 30 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 31 in 2025, and 32 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 1 student, a slight expansion of about 3.2%, which slightly intensifies competition pressure, and the ranking number is expected to increase somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 38th (37th in 2025, 39th in 2024), with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities, with a solid foundation and sustained appeal to candidates. In 2026, the school's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus), while in 2025, the reputation was negative (internship safety incident). The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (rated as average), with overall exposure not high. In 2026, there are no major negative public opinions in the reputation signals, which has limited impact on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology was rated A, Software Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering were rated A-, and Metallurgical Engineering was rated A, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above. Enrollment majors such as Automation, Computer Science, and Robotics Engineering highly match the advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all rated as highly recommended or recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis, highly consistent with Northeastern University's enrollment directions like Automation and Computer Science, with related major popularity continuing to rise. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Beijing in 2026 is about 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% compared to 2025 (65,434), sharply intensifying the competitive environment and pushing rankings higher. The main campus of Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region. Beijing candidates have certain regional preference differences for universities in the Northeast, but as a 985 university, Northeastern University has a strong brand effect, and its enrollment plan in Beijing is stable at around 30, expanding to 32 in 2026, with relatively stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8325, the slight expansion in 2026 (31→32, pushing the ranking up by about 161 places), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Beijing by about 29.7% (intensified competition pushing rankings higher), the high alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors (partially attracting candidates), and the stable school level, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 8536, with a fluctuation range of 8036–9036.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8036–9036, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (8036), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Automation and Computer Science. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 8500), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering and the Economics and Management Experimental Class. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (9036), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings.
